recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.

recommendations.title: The Cowboy Way
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Thriller, Western
recommendations.overview: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.

recommendations.title: The Outlaw Josey Wales
recommendations.overview: After avenging his family's brutal murder, Wales is pursued by a pack of soldiers. He prefers to travel alone, but ragtag outcasts are drawn to him - and Wales can't bring himself to leave them unprotected.

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: Broken
recommendations.overview: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

recommendations.title: Bacurau
recommendations.overview: Bacurau, a small town in the Brazilian sertão, mourns the loss of its matriarch, Carmelita, who lived to be 94. Days later, its inhabitants notice that their community has vanished from most maps.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Rio Bravo
recommendations.overview: A small-town sheriff in the American West enlists the help of a disabled man, a drunk, and a young gunfighter in his efforts to hold in jail the brother of the local bad guy.

recommendations.title: The Warrior's Way
recommendations.overview: A warrior-assassin is forced to hide in a small town in the American Badlands after refusing a mission.
